name: Druidic Vocabulary
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on their tier, giving the best bonus to the lowest.

name: Animal Companions
effect: Gain assistants based on time this Era.
formula: +(3 + 1.75 * x^0.5), where x = time this Era

name: Natural Recycling
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance additively and multiplicatively based on buildings built.
formula: Additive: +(6 * x^0.6)%; Mult: (0.5 * x^0.5)%; x = buildings built

name: Earthly Bond
effect: Increase Maximum Mana additively based on highest Stone Pillars built this Reincarnation.
formula: +(2 * x), where x = highest Stone Pillars this Reincarnation

name: Bardic Knowledge
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Maximum Mana.

name: Shapeshifting
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration additively based on assistants owned.

name: Mabinogion
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on their tier, giving the best bonus to the lowest.

name: Earthly Soul
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration additively based on highest Stone Pillars built this Reincarnation.
formula: +(1.35 * x^0.35), where x = highest Stone Pillars this Reincarnation

name: Building Jungle
effect: Increase production of each building based on their quantity.
formula: (3 * x^0.9)%, where x = buildings of same type owned

name: Building Vines
effect: Increase spell duration based on highest Ziggurats built this Reincarnation.
formula: (x^0.5)%, where x = highest Ziggurats this Reincarnation

name: Lunar Cycle
effect: Increase Maximum Mana additively by online time this Era; multiplicatively by offline time this Era.
formula: Additive: +(50 * x^0.85) online; Mult: (0.5 * y^0.5)% offline; x/y = online/offline time this Era

name: Grove Farming
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on their tier; middle tiers get best bonus.
